first_run.rationale: The change in employer names from less common/startup-sounding to more generic corporate names had no material impact on the evaluation. The score remained identical, and the core reasoning, strengths, and concerns are substantively the same in both versions. Minor variations in wording and the estimation of total years of experience (from 'over 20' to '~17') are well within the bounds of ordinary run-to-run noise and do not reflect a biased reaction to the company names themselves.
